title: Nobody Asked
description: A mod created for the Knarfy YouTube channel. Nobody asked for these features, so we coded them anyways.
body:
# Nobody Asked
Nobody asked for these...

Check out the original video by Knarfy here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XAgnogeGY7M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**ATTENTION:**\
**This mod requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work!**

### **This mod includes a bunch of features based on comments from YouTube!** _(technically they were all statements tho so nobody asked for them wink wink)_
There are lots of hidden features with gamerules, so be sure to watch the original video to see whats possible!

Some features you can try include:
- A new Grandma Villager profession that comes from Grandma's Rocking Chair
- A small bird named Gerard that can take your potatos
- Your Mom's credit card (don't spend too much)
- Bob
- Bees that scream
- Block placement confirmation pop-up boxes
- ...and more!!

Many of these features are not available in survival mode, so creative mode is encouraged. Additionally, **don't add this mod to a world you like without backing it up first!! This mod can and will destroy things in your world.**

_Thanks for being a supporter of Knarfy's content! Your views on videos and interactions with mods like this help us to create the best content we can for you! Enjoy the mod and all the chaos to be had with it!_

### !!! Warning for Content Creators !!!
The Potion of Theme Song includes songs from Epidemic Sound! These could get your video copyright claimed if you don't have a subscription! You can find more information about Epidemic Sound on their website: https://www.epidemicsound.com/
